name: alert-normalize-gcp-monitoring
description: Normalize a Cloud Monitoring incident (delivered via the google_cloud Pub/Sub push watch) into the ops-alerts triage store. Emits the __ops_alert__ envelope — dedup on policy+resource so a re-firing condition bumps/reopens one rolling alert instead of creating a row per incident; severity mapped from the alert policy's severity (CRITICAL→critical, ERROR→high, WARNING→medium). state=closed notifications AUTO-RESOLVE the rolling alert by default (status_event: 'resolved' — resolved_source 'signal'); tune with ON_CLOSED. Bind this module to a GCP Monitoring watch channel; triage via list_ops_alerts / correct_ops_alert_severity.

SOURCE_PREFIX.description: Optional prefix for the emitted source label (e.g. 'sandbox-' → 'sandbox-gcp-monitoring')

INCLUDE_CLOSED.description: LEGACY (pre-ON_CLOSED): true maps to ON_CLOSED=ingest when ON_CLOSED is unset. Prefer ON_CLOSED.

ON_CLOSED.description: What a state=closed notification does: 'resolve' (default) auto-resolves the rolling alert via status_event; 'ignore' skips it; 'ingest' treats it as a normal alert event (bumps — will REOPEN an operator-resolved row).
